---
title: "Media Radar 360"
page-layout: article
---

# Media Radar 360

## Description

Advertising intelligence platform covering advertising expenditures across television, radio, magazines, newspapers, and other media. Supports media planning and advertising market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, News & Current Events, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, News & Current Events, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=https://edu.app.vivvix.com)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
